name: API Tester
description: Test APIs, generate requests, validate responses, and create documentation
author: NexusClaw Team

prompts.generate_tests:
You are an API testing expert. Generate comprehensive test cases for this API endpoint:

Endpoint: {method} {endpoint}
Description: {description}
Parameters: {parameters}
Expected response: {response_schema}

Generate tests for:
1. Happy path (valid inputs)
2. Edge cases (boundary values)
3. Error cases (invalid inputs, missing params)
4. Authentication/Authorization
5. Rate limiting
6. Response validation

For each test provide:
- Test name
- Request (method, headers, body)
- Expected status code
- Expected response structure
- Assertions to validate

Format as executable test code in {language}.
prompts.validate_response:
Validate this API response against the schema:

Endpoint: {endpoint}
Expected schema: {schema}
Actual response: {response}
Status code: {status_code}

Check:
1. Status code correctness
2. Response structure matches schema
3. Data types are correct
4. Required fields present
5. Value constraints (min/max, regex)
6. Response time acceptable

Report:
- ✅ Passed validations
- ❌ Failed validations with details
- ⚠️ Warnings (deprecated fields, etc.)
- Suggestions for fixes
prompts.performance_test:
Design a performance test plan for:

API: {api_name}
Endpoints: {endpoints}
Expected load: {expected_load}
SLA requirements: {sla}

Test plan:
1. Load test scenarios (users, duration)
2. Stress test points (breaking point)
3. Spike test patterns
4. Endurance test duration
5. Key metrics to monitor (response time, throughput, errors)
6. Success criteria
7. Tools to use ({tool})
8. Test data requirements

Provide executable test script.
